result: I would make every human mind born with an un-erasable awareness that every other person feels pain, joy, love, fear, and loneliness in the exact same vivid, irrefutable way they do. Not a concept, not an intellectual fact—an immediate, felt conviction as obvious as the taste of salt. Nothing else would need to be legislated; the rest of history would be a long struggle to catch up to that single datum.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
